archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) + Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for data density

layout.grid_strategy: The Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6)
layout.card_style: Flat solid surfaces (bg-zinc-900) with 1px border (border-white/10). No soft shadows, use drop-shadow only for floating elements.
layout.alignment: Left-align text and dense data. Center-align empty states or hero text.

components.navigation: Sticky top bar, z-50, Glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10). Must contain Logo, Nav Links, User Profile/Login.
components.scanner_view: Split layout. Left: Video feed/Upload box with a targeting reticle (SVG). Right: Extraction results form. Use Shadcn forms but customize with dark slate backgrounds.
components.data_tables: High density. Use JetBrains Mono for prices/years. Use colored badges for condition (emerald for Mint, amber for Near Mint, rose for Damaged).
components.buttons: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Primary: bg-amber-500 text-zinc-950 font-bold. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs. bg-zinc-950 border-white/10 focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500 text-white.

motion.hover: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] on cards, transition-colors duration-200.
motion.loader: Scanner sweep line animation (using framer-motion or CSS keyframes) over the card image.

placeholder_card.description: Holographic Pokemon trading card, used as placeholder for scanned card preview

dashboard_bg.description: Dark slate texture background. Use with low opacity (10-20%) or multiply blend mode behind main hero or header sections to add texture.

empty_collection.description: Hand holding colorful cards, use for empty state 'Start your collection' screen

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react (already installed). Keep icon stroke width to 1.5 for a premium, delicate look.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure amber text on zinc-950 passes APCA. Use amber-400 for text, amber-500 for backgrounds with black text.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-amber-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-zinc-950.
accessibility.testing: All buttons, inputs, and major sections MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind classes. Do not use raw CSS files for styling.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex logic (Tables, Dialogs, Select) but strip out any default Vercel-like light mode styles and apply the dark slate theme.
Implement the 'Control Room Grid' for the dashboard showing the collection.
In the scanner view, the image preview must not exceed 80vh on mobile.
Use framer-motion for the scanner sweeping line effect over the uploaded image.
Use Google OAuth for login, design a clean login screen centering the auth button over the dark slate background image.
NEVER use placeholder text for images. Use the provided media URLs.
Include data-testid on all interactive elements.
